title: PT-141
description: PT-141 (Bremelanotide) is an FDA-approved peptide for treating hypoactive sexual desire disorder. It works through melanocortin receptors in the brain to increase sexual desire, making it unique among sexual health treatments.

research.title: Effect of bremelanotide on body weight of obese women
research.summary: Bremelanotide reduced body weight and caloric intake in obese women in clinical trials, showing promise as a treatment for weight loss.

research.title: Long-term safety and efficacy of bremelanotide for Hypoactive Sexual Desire Disorder
research.summary: Study found that bremelanotide effectively improved sexual desire in premenopausal women with hypoactive sexual desire disorder over 52 weeks.

research.title: Bremelanotide for the treatment of Hypoactive Sexual Desire Disorder
research.summary: In clinical trials, Bremelanotide significantly increased sexual desire and reduced distress in women with sexual dysfunction, showing a favorable safety profile.

sentiment.summary: Users report significant increases in libido and sexual desire. Effects work differently than PDE5 inhibitors - targets desire rather than mechanics. Nausea common but manageable.

dosage.label: Frequency:
dosage.description: Not more than once in 24 hours.
